title: Abuse Queue Triage - 2026-04-19
body:
Moderation actions completed for high-severity reports:

• Banned: spam_wave_42 — Phishing links posted across 6 channels
• Warned: toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers
• Closed: report_006 — False positive; core_maintainer was brigaded after legitimate moderation decision

3 of 6 reports handled. Remaining: 3 lower-severity reports pending review.
